raw_consumer_statement: I got a call from wayfair Mastercard, saying that my account was past due. I have not used an wayfair thing since XX/XX/year>. Then all the sudden there is a charge on my account that I dont recognize. I tried using their report system, but it doesnt work. I tried chatting with someone and the person refused to help. She told me to give a call to this number. I called. 1 hour later ( I recorded the call ) I was told that the account in question had been reported ad fraud. That the balance went to 0, and that I would recieve communication by mail that the account had been closed and there was nothing else I needed to do. However, couple minutes later I recieve an email saying that there is a balance on my accoint and also now, the account has another number. Idk who to contact. Their website doesn't work on reporting fraud, someone now out there has my address and name. And now my voice. And wayfair is creating accounts without permission. I dont even know now that the number is called from their website is the correct number. I believe this can be a scam. But they need to be notified. And I expect to be notified as well that this account has been closed and that my information is not out there for scam.
